headlines.title: ADNOC Accelerates $55 Billion Investment after UAE’s OPEC Exit
headlines.summary: The Abu Dhabi national oil company, ADNOC, is accelerating investment in growth and production after the United Arab Emirates (UAE) left OPEC on May 1.
